surface_forms: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
description: town in Orange County, North Carolina, United States
description_wiki: Chapel Hill is a town in the counties of Orange and Durham, North Carolina, United States.

surface_forms: Southern Oral History Program at UNC Chapel Hill
description_wiki: The Southern Oral History Program (SOHP), located in the Love House and Hutchins Forum in the historic district of Chapel Hill, North Carolina, is a research institution dedicated to collecting and preserving oral histories from across the southern United States.

entity: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
surface_forms: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
aliases: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill for its Department of Romance Studies
description: public research university in Chapel Hill, North Carolina, United States
description_wiki: The University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill (UNC Chapel Hill, UNC, North Carolina or Carolina) is a public research university in Chapel Hill, North Carolina, United States.

description: city in Pitt County, North Carolina, United States
description_wiki: Greenville ( GREEN-vil; locally  GREEN-vəl) is the county seat of and the most populous city in Pitt County, North Carolina, United States.
